title: Villagers Drop Eggs
description: This datapack makes villagers and zombie villagers drop spawn eggs. It's great for transporting those mobs.
body:
## Villagers Drop Egg Datapack
Ever spent hours trying to transport villagers across oceans, mountains, and caves — only for one to mysteriously disappear on the way? Yeah, we’ve all been there.
This datapack makes villager logistics simple, fast, and surprisingly satisfying. Now, when a villager or zombie villager dies, they drop a villager spawn egg, letting you move them anywhere with ease. No more rails, boats, or suffocating breeders. Just pure, portable efficiency.
How It Works
Villagers drop villager spawn eggs upon death.
Zombie villagers also drops Zombie villager spawn eggs, so you can keep your trading potential even after accidents due to burning.
The spawn egg can be placed anywhere to instantly respawn a villager — perfect for transporting or relocating them safely.
### Why This Matters
No More Painful Transports: Forget railways, boats, and piston contraptions — just pick up and go.
Zombie Villager Friendly: You’ll never lose a valuable villager after a raid or a bad night again.
Lightweight & Seamless: Runs entirely through loot tables, so it’s performance-friendly and multiplayer-safe.
Perfect for Builders: Move villagers to your castles, sky islands, or outposts without the headache.
### Compatibility
Works with Minecraft 1.21.9 and newer
Compatible with most other datapacks and mods
Uses standard loot tables — no code conflicts expected
### Intended Experience
This datapack is made for players and server admins who love building complex villages, trading halls, or adventure maps — without wasting hours on transportation. It keeps gameplay fair, balanced, and frustration-free while giving you more freedom to focus on creativity and expansion.
If you’ve ever lost a librarian to a zombie mid-transport, this datapack was made for you.
